description.text: Island hopping BnL-style! Two Cubes and a Base.

ru.original: Island hopping BnL-style! Two Cubes and a Base.
ru.translation: Перемещение по островам в стиле Block N Load! Два куба и база.

es.original: Island hopping BnL-style! Two Cubes and a Base.
es.translation:
Una isla con barcos listos para zarpar.
Dos generadores y un núcleo.

de.original: Island hopping BnL-style! Two Cubes and a Base.
de.translation: Inselurlaub im BnL-Style! Zwei Generatoren und eine Basis.

pt.original: Island hopping BnL-style! Two Cubes and a Base.
pt.translation: Salte de ilha em ilha no estilo Block N Load de ser! Dois Cubos e uma Base.

fr.original: Island hopping BnL-style! Two Cubes and a Base.
fr.translation: Passez d'île en île de manière conventionnelle ou à la Block N Load ! Deux cubes et une base.
